MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Dismissal - No Appearance

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Danny Patel, plaintiff in pro per

Nick Cavalleri, defendant
Tyler Macmillan, Esq. by limited scope representation for defendant

Settlement conference held. Parties entered into a signed agreement as to defendant Nick Cavalleri only, which was filed. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 3161 16th Street, #417, San Francisco, CA 94103.

Trial date remains as to defendant Nicole Salazar.
